## Edges

**(2) Launch&nbsp;**
```
edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=#E6F6F7;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;
```

**(3) Push Image&nbsp;**
```
edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=#E6F6F7;fontSize=14;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;strokeWidth=3;dashed=1;
```

**EfNL6K7a2vQ8G4ZJS9MK-27**
```
edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=3;strokeColor=light-dark(#0066CC,#56AEFF);fontSize=14;dashed=1;
```

**EfNL6K7a2vQ8G4ZJS9MK-35**
```
edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;
```

**EfNL6K7a2vQ8G4ZJS9MK-38**
```
edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=3;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;dashed=1;fontSize=14;
```

**(2) Assume Role**
```
edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;dashed=1;strokeWidth=3;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;
```

**&nbsp;(1) Update changes - Trigger&nbsp;**
```
edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=3;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;dashed=1;fontSize=14;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;
```

**(4) Push Commit GitOps Repo**
```
edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;dashed=1;strokeWidth=3;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;fontSize=14;
```

**(5) Webhook**
```
edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=3;dashed=1;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;
```
